violations.text: Spatula observed stored on an unclean surface (beneath the flattop grill) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

The doors to the outside, located in the side and front of establishment, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2026
